title: AI agents explained: Build your first agent in 8 minutes
summary: A tutorial demonstrating how to build autonomous, self-correcting multi-agent systems using Google's Agent Development Kit. The video covers ReAct Framework theory and three agent patterns, then walks through building a practical blog-writing agent with validation and auto-correction capabilities using Python.
writeup: This Google Cloud Tech tutorial walks through building AI agents with the Google Agent Development Kit (ADK), using a self-correcting blog writing agent as the worked example. It grounds the build in the ReAct Framework and the agent loop, and it covers three agent patterns: sequential, reactive, and planning. The practical focus extends to multi-agent systems, showing how individual agents combine into a working pipeline.
